name: fixture/psr0-fallback
description: Root PSR-0 entry with empty prefix — Composer routes empty-prefix PSR-0 (and PSR-4) entries to fallbackDirsPsr0 / fallbackDirsPsr4 instead of the per-letter prefix buckets. Magento root composer.json hits this with a top-level autoload.psr-0 map keyed on `""`.
